title: cynodon ciliaris
intro: Cynodon ciliaris, also known as Bermuda grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Africa and tropical Asia. It is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cynodon ciliaris include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Cynodon ciliaris is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its essential oil is used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
